allow: Bash(python -c "from garminconnect import Garmin; import inspect; print\('Garmin.__init__ signature:', inspect.signature\(Garmin.__init__\)\); print\('Garmin.login signature:', inspect.signature\(Garmin.login\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import playwright; print\('playwright version:', playwright.__version__ if hasattr\(playwright, '__version__'\) else 'installed'\)")
